claims.statement: On this machine and one-million-cell DEFLATE level 6 workload, numeric-inline median elapsed time was 1583 ms with 6.87109 MB peak working set; mixed-inline median elapsed time was 1248 ms with 6.88672 MB peak working set.

All seven representative runs kept the worksheet body pending buffer below the 262144-byte limit, performed nonzero batch flushes, and reported zero active worksheet temporary files after successful close.

For numeric-inline and mixed-inline, median package-close time was 1379/1048 ms versus 138/175 ms generation time, identifying ZIP/DEFLATE package close as the dominant measured stage for these workloads.

For one million unique strings, inline median elapsed/peak was 1498 ms and 6.92578 MB versus sharedStrings 3356 ms and 123.039 MB; this supports InlineString as the default for unknown or high-cardinality text on this workload only.
